lede: A look at January 7 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Caster Semenya and Joseph Bonaparte, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Hot air balloon
events.desc: A hot air balloon crashes near Carterton, New Zealand, killing all 11 people on board.

events.title: History of Ghana
events.desc: The Fourth Republic of Ghana is inaugurated with Jerry Rawlings as president.

events.title: Brunei
events.desc: Brunei becomes the sixth member of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN).

events.title: Cuba
events.desc: The United States recognizes the new Cuban government of Fidel Castro.

events.title: Marian Anderson
events.desc: Contralto Marian Anderson becomes the first person of color to perform at the Metropolitan Opera in Giuseppe Verdi's Un ballo in maschera.

events.title: Kentucky Air National Guard
events.desc: Kentucky Air National Guard pilot Thomas Mantell crashes while in pursuit of a supposed UFO.

events.title: Guy Menzies
events.desc: Guy Menzies flies the first solo non-stop trans-Tasman flight (from Australia to New Zealand) in 11 hours and 45 minutes, crash-landing on New Zealand's west coast.

events.title: Montenegro
events.desc: Montenegrin guerrilla fighters rebel against the planned annexation of Montenegro by Serbia, but fail.

events.title: Bank of North America
events.desc: The first American commercial bank, the Bank of North America, opens.

events.title: Galileo Galilei
events.desc: Galileo Galilei makes his first observation of the four Galilean moons: Ganymede, Callisto, Io and Europa, although he is not able to distinguish the last two until the following night.

births.name: Millard Fillmore
births.line: American politician, 13th President of the United States

births.name: Sandford Fleming
births.line: Scottish-Canadian engineer, created Universal Standard Time

deaths.text: Jean-Marie Le Pen, French intelligence officer and politician
Edmund Barton, Australian judge and politician, 1st Prime Minister of Australia

observances.text: Christian Feast Day: Blessed Marie Thérèse Haze
Christian Feast Day: Synaxis of John the Forerunner & Baptist (Julian calendar)
